title: Inventory Management API
shortDescription: RESTful API for multi-warehouse inventory management.
fullDescription: A production-grade REST API for managing inventory across multiple warehouses. Features include JWT authentication with refresh token rotation, role-based access control, batch operations, audit logging, and full stock movement history.
problem: The client had a legacy inventory system with no API, making integrations with e-commerce platforms impossible.
solution: A clean Express/Node.js REST API with OpenAPI documentation, comprehensive test coverage, and a migration path from the legacy system.
impact: TODO: e.g. Delivered in a 2-week sprint, fully documented
TODO: e.g. Enabled e-commerce integrations previously impossible
